global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, all-black body and glossy feathers. It has a stout, slightly curved black bill and dark eyes. The wings are broad and rounded, and the tail is short and squared. The legs and feet are also black, giving it a uniform appearance.
spatial_relations: The bill is positioned at the front of the head
The wings extend from the sides of the body
The tail is at the rear of the body
The legs are positioned under the body
